summary: Despite the implementation response text claiming the plan was empty and nothing was implemented, the working tree contains a complete, correct change. app/page.tsx now has all remaining user-visible English strings translated to Russian: the two 'Job not found' error messages, the RSS collection panel ('RSS collection', 'No collections yet', 'create one', 'and add sources first'), the collection select ('Choose a collection…', 'sources' suffix), the collect button ('Collecting articles…' / 'Collect Articles'), the 'Run Analysis' button, the reset buttons, and the topic warning. Grep confirms no English remains in JSX text nodes — only code identifiers, classNames, and URLs (correctly left untranslated). The diff is scoped strictly to app/page.tsx (10 insertions, 10 deletions), consistent with the prior incremental-localization commits. Typecheck and production build both pass. Task 015 is satisfied.
